data.body: 709 (08a8) CI FAILED on macos-latest leg: Makefile 'lint: actionlint-bin' force-downloaded linux_amd64 actionlint -> 'cannot execute binary file' on macOS (make lint runs on both ubuntu+macos matrix legs). Fixed: zizmor runs on all hosts (pip); actionlint uses an on-PATH/.tools binary if present, else installs the pinned linux build ONLY on Linux, else SKIPs with a notice on non-Linux (release.yml runs on ubuntu; the Linux CI leg is the gate). Local mac: runs (brew actionlint). Simulated macos-CI: clean skip. Amended 709, re-pushing.
